title: Goa PSC – Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More – 25 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Goa PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Goa PSC Recruitment 2026: 25 Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More vacancies. Apply online from 8 May to 22 May 2026 at gpsc.goa.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: (i) Degree in any branch from a recognized University or equivalent; (ii) Knowledge of Konkani.
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Engineer, Psychiatrist and More – 25 Posts

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: On or before the last date of submission of application (e-challan valid for 7 days from generation; stamped e-challan to be submitted to Commission's office on or before last date)

age_limit.age_details: Shortlisted candidates called for Interview. Date and details will be communicated via email/mobile/Commission's website.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the Commission's website at https://gpsc.goa.gov.in or the Government of Goa portal at https://cbes.goa.gov.in/. Candidates should carefully read the "Instructions" available on the Commission's website before filling the application online. The email address and mobile number of the candidate should invariably be provided in the application form. All candidates are advised to check their email accounts/mobile phones/Commission's website regularly for updates/notices concerning their application.
seo_tags: Goa Public Service Commission Assistant Engineer
